productDisplayName: Nike Men's Zoom Ambassador III Blue White Shoe
description: Designed exclusively for the Asian and Pacific feet, the nike Zoom LBJ Amabssador 3 is a fabulous Basketball sneaker. With a tumbled leather upper and lift-off wings on the sides, this sneaker is possibly the best choice for a hard game of basketball.Upper Mesh ypper for maximum breathability Synthetic toe box and wrap around heel cup for maximum durability and shoe structure Lace-up system for a snug, customised Fit Lift-up wings attached to the lacing for customised midfoot support Padded and meshed tongue for breathability LeBron James branding embossed on tongue for style Padded collar for snug fit Lion, Ambassador and swoosh branding on heel unit for style Midsole Phylon midsole for lightweight, cushioned comfort Visible Air Max unit in the heel for maximum cushioning and impact protection during heel-strike Padded footbed for all-day comfort Outsole TPR outsole for enhanced durability Multi-directional grooves with a pivot point on big toe mound for easy 180 degree movement on the foot Leaf grooves on heel unit for better traction and grip Scooped midfoot for ergonomic comfort Shoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
